description: Port Beszel listens on (default: 8090, hardcoded upstream). Must match Railway's PORT.
Public URL of your Beszel hub (e.g., https://your-app.up.railway.app). Used for links in emails and notifications.
Email of a user to auto-authenticate (skip login page). Leave empty to require login.
Set to true to disable password auth and use OAuth/OIDC only.
